# draw-canvas

Reusable freehand draw canvas. Renders a `<canvas>` overlay sized to a target rect; tracks freehand strokes with color and width. Used by the screenshot editor (annotate a captured image) and `draw-on-app` (annotate the live app before capture).

Strokes are stored in image-natural pixels so they survive resizing and can be baked into a PNG via `applyStrokes(blob, strokes)`.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Reusable freehand draw canvas (color/width strokes). Used by the screenshot editor and draw-on-app.
- Exports (web):
  - Types: `DrawCanvasProps`, `Stroke`
  - Values: `applyStrokes`, `DrawCanvas`
